title: Termite Treatment in Kensington, Brooklyn | $800–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Kensington, Brooklyn. Expert termite extermination for homes & buildings. Licensed specialists. Call for inspection: $800–$4,000.
intro: Termites pose a serious threat to Kensington's diverse housing stock, from pre-war apartment buildings to charming single-family homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Kensington, protecting your property from costly structural damage. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and proven treatment solutions to eliminate termite colonies and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kensington residents for years with transparent pricing, guaranteed results, and same-day emergency service. Our team understands the unique termite challenges facing Brooklyn's older buildings and delivers customized treatment plans that work for your specific property type and budget.
localContext: Kensington's beautiful tree-lined streets and mix of vintage brick homes, brownstones, and multi-family dwellings near Prospect Park and the Church Avenue commercial corridor create ideal conditions for termite activity. The neighborhood's aging wooden structures and proximity to green spaces make regular termite inspections essential for property owners throughout the area bordered by Ocean Parkway and Coney Island Avenue.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Kensington typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Kensington homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include mud tubes on foundation walls, hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows, small holes in drywall, and visible wood damage. Kensington's older homes are particularly susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Kensington are completed in one day, though larger infestations may require follow-up visits. Liquid treatments and bait systems typically show results within weeks, with monitoring continuing for several months to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do you treat termites in Kensington apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in termite treatment for all property types in Kensington, including multi-family buildings, brownstones, and apartment complexes. We work with property managers and landlords to provide comprehensive solutions with minimal disruption to residents.
